failure_reason: Confirmed BMF-grammar.bml class-body parsing was already fixed on main, then added Form-side BodySource execution for the real AsString and AsBMLString helper bodies from BMF-grammar.bml. Initial proof returned 3071, exposing the carriage-return skip sentinel issue; fixed known-escape detection and reran to pass at 4095. Adjacent BMF body/main/start-stack and char escape proofs remain green.
